identity.name: Zink
identity.tagline: The dead retain ownership of their story.

ac.note: mithral chain shirt · amulet of natural armor

resilience: Immune to disease, sleep, fear, and all emotion effects
+4 vs. mind-affecting, paralysis, poison, and stun
attacksNote: Point-Blank Shot adds +1 attack and damage within 30 ft. Startoss Style stacks thrown-weapon bonuses; Startoss Shower ricochets one throw across multiple targets.

specials.name: Death Attack & True Death
specials.note: Three rounds of study, one sneak attack: the target dies or is paralyzed (DC 19 Fort). Raising her victims requires a DC 20 caster level check — her verdicts are designed to be final.

specials.name: Sneak Attack +3d6
specials.note: Precision damage within 30 ft. against the flat-footed, the flanked, and the unwary.

specials.name: Nanite Surge
specials.note: +13 to any one d20 roll, declared before rolling. Her circuitry flares with torchlight for a round — the tell of a machine refusing to miss.

specials.name: Fervor
specials.note: 2d6 mending as a swift action on herself, or spent to cast a prepared warpriest spell, self-only, no somatics. 5/day.

specials.name: Channel Negative Energy
specials.note: 2d6 negative energy in a 30-ft. burst (DC 16 Will half). Costs two uses of fervor.

specials.name: Blessings: Trickery & Evil
specials.note: Double conjures an illusory twin for 5 rounds; Unholy Strike charges a weapon with +1d6 against good creatures.

specials.name: Spell Combat & Spellstrike
specials.note: Casts and cuts in the same breath — touch spells ride the Black Blade and use its 19–20 threat range.

specials.name: Poison Use & Hidden Weapons
specials.note: Never risks her own venom, and carries +5 to conceal every blade on her person (+2 more for the dagger).

load: 15 lbs of gear — light load, by every definition

signatureWeapon.name: The Black Blade
signatureWeapon.subtitle: Sentient executioner's dagger
signatureWeapon.lore: Believed by some to be the relic of an ancient executioner. The blade is said to communicate with its owner — and, occasionally, with others.
abilities: Black Blade Strike — +2 damage for a minute, on request
Energy Attunement — strikes as cold, electricity, or fire; sonic or force when it really means it
Keeps its own arcane pool, and its own counsel
Knowledge (arcana) +2 — it has seen this before

familiar.name: The Owl
familiar.bond: An owl of unusual intelligence, reported at murders, executions, and battlefields before Zink herself arrives. No one has recorded its name. It has never once testified.
perks: Appears at death sites before she does
Known to some as The Last Witness
Known to the courts as The Silent Juror
